rules.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback and keep source layer as history.
rules.rationale: ctext commonly blocks default CLI user-agent and needs browser-like fetch semantics.

rules.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback and keep source layer as game/worldbuilding.
rules.rationale: fandom mirrors frequently reject non-browser clients with 403.

rules.suggestion: HTTP 403 detected. Auto-route to browser-static-html fallback with strict citation extraction.
